prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类/理科最低位次分别为6023→5598→5890→6496→5529，整体呈波动走势，2025年位次（5529名）为近5年最优，较2024年大幅前移约967名，显示 报考热度回升；该校在吉林省物理类招生计划2021年118人、2022–2025年均为115人，2026年计划120人，较2025年扩招5人（+4.3%），扩招幅度较小，对 竞争格局影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中南大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第27名，近年排名稳定在23–27名区间，属于国内顶尖高校梯队；2026年声誉评价偏负面（原校长张尧学因涉嫌严重违纪违法被查），可能对报考心理产生一定负面影响；抖音综合热度排名第85（一般），短视频曝光量处于 中游水平；2024年曾出现部分省份断档信号，2025年重庆地下空间工程专业录取分低于国家专项线，显示部分专业吸引力有所下降；拥有冶金工程A+、护理学A+ 、材料科学与工程A、临床医学A-、计算机科学与技术A-等13个A类学科，学科实力雄厚，对高分考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工 程等热门工科专业持续高热推荐，与中南大学优势学科高度契合；临床医学、口腔医学等医学类专业保持高热推荐，湘雅医学院品牌效应显著；本省2026年考生总数约11.1万，较 2025年（约11.1万）基本持平，竞争压力变化不大。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅前移的强势表现、2026年小幅扩招（+4.3%）、 学校声誉偏负面但学科实力强劲等因素，预计2026年物理类最低位次约5730名，区间5480–5980名。

- 计算机类。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约5730名，区间5480–5980名。位次在区间下限（5480名以内）可重点冲刺一档的临床医学八年制、口腔医学、计算机类等王牌专业；位次在区间中部（5500–5800名） 以二档电子信息、自动化、临床医学五年制等为主攻方向；位次在区间上限（5800名以外）建议以三档材料类、土木类、化工类等作为保底选择，同时可关注交通运输类、能源动 力类等中等难度专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category/Science were 6023→5598→5890→6496→5529 respectively, showing an overall fluctuating trend. The 2025 ranking (5529th) is the best in the past five years, significantly moving up by about 967 places compared to 2024, indicating a rebound in application popularity. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Jilin Province was 118 in 2021, 115 from 2022 to 2025, and 120 in 2026, an increase of 5 students (+4.3%) compared to 2025, a relatively small expansion with limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Central South University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. It ranked 27th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable ranking range of 23–27 in recent years, belonging to the top tier of domestic universities. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (former president Zhang Yaoxue is under investigation for serious violations of discipline and law), which may have a certain negative impact on application psychology. Its comprehensive popularity ranking on Douyin is 85th (average), with short video exposure at a mid-level. In 2024, there were signals of a cutoff in some provinces, and in 2025, the admission score for the Underground Space Engineering major in Chongqing was lower than the national special line, indicating a decline in attractiveness for some majors. It has 13 A-level disciplines including Metallurgical Engineering A+, Nursing A+, Materials Science and Engineering A, Clinical Medicine A-, Computer Science and Technology A-, etc., with strong disciplinary strength, strongly attracting high-scoring students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, highly consistent with Central South University's advantageous disciplines. Medical majors like Clinical Medicine and Stomatology remain highly recommended, with the Xiangya Medical College brand effect being significant. The total number of candidates in the province for 2026 is about 111,000, basically unchanged from 2025 (about 111,000), with little change in competitive pressure.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong performance of the significant ranking improvement in 2025, the small enrollment expansion in 2026 (+4.3%), the somewhat negative reputation but strong disciplinary strength, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be about 5730, with a range of 5480–5980.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (8-year program)
- Stomatology (5+3 integrated program)
- Computer Science.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Electronic Information
- Automation (Automation and Electrical)
- Clinical Medicine (5-year program)
- Mathematics
- Software Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Materials (Metallurgical Materials)
- Civil Engineering (Civil Safety)
- Chemical and Pharmaceutical
- Surveying and Mapping (Remote Sensing, Surveying, and Geographic Information).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 5730, range 5480–5980. Candidates with rankings at the lower limit (within 5480) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors like Clinical Medicine 8-year, Stomatology, and Computer Science. Candidates with rankings in the middle (5500–5800) should target Tier 2 majors like Electronic Information, Automation, and Clinical Medicine 5-year as main directions. Candidates with rankings at the upper limit (outside 5800) are advised to choose Tier 3 majors like Materials, Civil Engineering, and Chemical as safety options, while also considering medium-difficulty majors like Transportation and Energy Power.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年历史类/文科最低位次分别为1013→871→912→847→1068，整体在847–1068名区间窄幅波动，2025年位次（1068名）为近5年最靠后，较2024年后移约221 名，显示竞争有所缓和；该校在吉林省历史类招生计划2021–2025年均为19人，2026年计划17人，较2025年缩招2人（-10.5%），缩招幅度较大，可能加剧 竞争。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中南大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第27名，综合实力稳居全国前列；2026年声誉评价偏负面（ 原校长张尧学被查），可能对整体报考热度产生一定抑制；抖音热度一般（排名第85），短视频平台曝光量有限；历史类招生专业均为文科类，受学校声誉波动影响相对较小。中南大学A类学科以工科和医学为主，历史类招生专业（法学、金融学类、中国语言文学类、外国语言文学类）无直接对应的A类学科，但法学类可关联马克思主义 理论A-，金融学类可关联管理科学与工程A-。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学专业社会热度推荐（偏热），适合考公；金融/财经/经济分化观望，对学校层次要求较高；汉语言/中 文推荐（偏热），考公优势明显；本省2026年历史类考生约3.09万人（按历史比例估算），较2025年（3.11万）基本持平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次后移趋势、2026年缩招10.5%（竞争加剧）、学校声誉偏负面但文科专业受影响较小等因素，预计2026年历史类最低位次约1020名，区间970–1070名。

- 法学
- 金融学类（经济管理类）。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约1020名，区间970–1070名。位次在区间下限（970名以内）可冲刺一档法学和金融学类；位次在区间中部（980–1050名）以二档中国语言文学类为主攻方向；位次在区 间上限（1050名以外）建议以三档外国语言文学类、数字出版作为保底。法学专业因考公优势明显，报考热度持续偏热，建议优先考虑。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category/Liberal Arts were 1013→871→912→847→1068, fluctuating narrowly within the 847–1068 range. The 2025 ranking (1068) is the lowest in the past five years, moving back about 221 places from 2024, indicating slightly eased competition. The enrollment plan for History Category in Jilin Province was 19 students each year from 2021 to 2025, and the 2026 plan is 17 students, a reduction of 2 students (-10.5%) compared to 2025, which may intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Central South University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 27th, with comprehensive strength firmly among the top in the country. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (former president Zhang Yaoxue under investigation), which may moderately suppress overall application enthusiasm. Its Douyin popularity is average (ranked 85th), with limited exposure on short video platforms. The History Category majors are all liberal arts, relatively less affected by fluctuations in the university's reputation. Central South University's A-class disciplines are mainly in engineering and medicine. The History Category majors (Law, Finance, Chinese Language and Literature, Foreign Languages and Literature) have no directly corresponding A-class disciplines, but Law can be linked to Marxist Theory A-, and Finance can be linked to Management Science and Engineering A-.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is socially recommended (slightly hot), suitable for civil service exams. Finance/Finance and Economics/Economics are in a wait-and-see state of divergence, with high requirements for university level. Chinese Language and Literature is recommended (slightly hot), with clear advantages for civil service exams. In 2026, the number of History Category examinees in the province is approximately 30,900 (estimated based on historical proportion), basically unchanged from 2025 (31,100).

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the trend of ranking moving back in 2025, the 10.5% enrollment reduction in 2026 (intensified competition), and the somewhat negative university reputation but limited impact on liberal arts majors, the predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is about 1020, with a range of 970–1070.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Law
- Finance (Economics and Management Category).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier)
- Foreign Languages and Literature
- Digital Publishing (International Communication Excellence Talent Cultivation Program Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 1020, with a range of 970–1070. Candidates with rankings at the lower end of the range (within 970) can aim for Tier 1 Law and Finance. Those with rankings in the middle of the range (980–1050) should focus on Tier 2 Chinese Language and Literature. Candidates with rankings at the upper end of the range (outside 1050) are advised to use Tier 3 Foreign Languages and Literature and Digital Publishing as safety options. Law, due to its clear advantages for civil service exams, continues to have high application enthusiasm and is recommended as a priority.
